trade.summary: Significant bilateral trade relationship. The UK exports financial services, pharmaceuticals, and machinery to Sweden. Sweden exports Volvo and Scania vehicles, IKEA goods, paper products, and pharmaceuticals (AstraZeneca) to the UK. AstraZeneca, though UK-headquartered, embodies the deep UK-Sweden business relationship.

diplomatic.summary: UK-Sweden relations are excellent and have strengthened markedly following Sweden's NATO accession in March 2024. Both countries are strongly pro-Ukraine, aligned on Russia sanctions, and committed to the rules-based international order. The UK was a key advocate for Sweden's NATO bid. UK-Sweden bilateral cooperation spans security, trade, and climate.

military.summary: Both NATO allies with strengthening defence cooperation. UK supported Sweden's NATO accession process. Joint exercises in Northern Europe. Swedish Gripen and UK Typhoon/Rafale cooperation in NATO air defence. Both countries cooperate on Baltic Sea security and Russia's northern flank. Saab-BAE Systems cooperation on defence systems.

financial.summary: London is a primary financial centre for Swedish companies. AstraZeneca (Sweden-UK), Ericsson, and other major Swedish companies are deeply integrated with UK capital markets. Swedish pension funds (AP funds) hold UK assets. UK-Sweden fintech cooperation is growing.

energy.summary: UK-Sweden cooperation in offshore wind (North Sea and Baltic Sea). Sweden's Vattenfall has major UK offshore wind investments. Both countries committed to clean energy transition. Cooperation in hydrogen and green steel (SSAB-UK partnerships).

scientific.summary: Exceptional research partnership. AstraZeneca bridges UK and Swedish pharmaceutical research. Collaboration in life sciences (Karolinska-Oxford-Cambridge links), AI, materials, and climate science. Many Swedish academics work in UK institutions. Horizon Europe cooperation restored.
